title: How to remove line breaks from a cell
task: Replace the newline characters inside a cell with spaces (or nothing) to flatten multi-line text.
keywords: delete line breaks in a cell

excel.note: CHAR(10) is the line-feed; use CHAR(13) too for Windows carriage returns.

explanation: CHAR(10) is the line-break character. SUBSTITUTE swaps every line break for a space, turning two-line text into one line: 'line1\nline2' becomes 'line1 line2'. Replace " " with "" to delete the breaks entirely.
